zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore於1289年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯。她和Robert De Lauder至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1337年12月2日在蘇格蘭享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore于1289年出生在苏格兰培爾培斯。她和Robert De Lauder至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1337年12月2日在苏格兰享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilbore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Wildmoor in Belbroughton (Worcestershire) and perhaps also from Wildmore Fen (Lincolnshire), though early evidence that the latter gave rise to a surname is lacking. A third possible source is the Weald Moors (Shropshire), recorded as Wyldemor' in 1291–2. The placenames derive from Old English wilde ‘wild’ + mōr ‘moor’. There may have been some confusion with the surname Willmer .

variants.name: Willmer
meanings: German and English (Sussex): variant of   Wilmer  .

variants.name: Wilmer
meanings: German and English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Wilmar (Middle English Wilmer, Old English Wilmǣr), composed of the elements wil(l) ‘will’ + mar ‘famous’. In England, there may have been some confusion with Wilmore .
History: Simon Wilmer settled in Kent County, MD, before 1680. William Holland Wilmer, born in Kent County in 1782, and his son Richard Hooker Wilmer (born 1816) were both Episcopal clergymen.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore was born in 1289, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Robert De Lauder. She died on 2 December 1337, in Scotland, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore est née en 1289, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Robert De Lauder. Elle est décédée le 2 décembre 1337, à Écosse, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore wurde 1289 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert De Lauder mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Dezember 1337 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore è nata il nel 1289 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Robert De Lauder. Morì il 2 dicembre 1337, nel Scotland, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilboreは1289年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた。彼女はRobert De Lauderとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1337年12月2日にスコットランドで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore(은)는 1289년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert De Lauder(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 12월 2일 스컷랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilbore nasceu em 1289, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Robert De Lauder. Ela faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1337, em Scotland, com 48 anos.
